name: Redux (Legacy Usage)
reason: Redux Toolkit is now the official recommendation, legacy createStore is marked deprecated
warning: @reduxjs/toolkit is now the official way to write Redux logic.

name: Create React App (CRA)
reason: No longer recommended by React docs, repo archived, last updated 2022
warning: This project is no longer maintained.

name: Enzyme (React Testing)
reason: Does not support React 18+, Airbnb stopped maintaining it
warning: Enzyme is not compatible with React 18.

name: Heroku GitHub Integration
reason: Suspended in 2022 due to security incident, restored but Heroku is shrinking overall
warning: Heroku continues to cut free and low-cost services

name: OpenAI GPT-3 Series API
reason: text-davinci-003 and other models being retired, replaced by GPT-3.5/4
warning: Legacy GPT-3 models are being retired on a rolling basis.

name: npm shrinkwrap
reason: package-lock.json is now the default, shrinkwrap is barely used
warning: npm-shrinkwrap.json is still supported but no longer recommended

name: Safari Legacy Extension Format
reason: Apple requires all extensions to migrate to Web Extension API format
warning: Legacy Safari extensions will stop working in future macOS releases.

name: Chrome Extension Manifest V2
reason: Google forcing migration to Manifest V3, V2 extensions will stop working in Chrome
warning: Manifest V2 extensions will be disabled in Chrome in June 2025.

name: Libraries Still on Python 2
reason: Python 2 reached EOL in 2020, but some libraries still haven't migrated to Python 3
warning: Python 2 has reached end-of-life. No security patches will be released.

name: Docker Hub Free Team Plan
reason: Docker keeps tightening free tier limits, restricting pull rates, deleting inactive images
alternative: GitHub Container Registry, AWS ECR Public
warning: Docker Hub free users face increasing restrictions
